hero.headline: Reliable stock, faster operations
hero.sub: Keep inventory up to date, streamline the warehouse to invoice process, and avoid surprises.

solutions.title: From chaos to clarity
solutions.sub: When parts, counts, and pricing live in different places, small errors compound. Here is the day-to-day friction we remove—so your workshop can rely on a single view of inventory and a smoother path from shelf to invoice.

inventoryScattered.title: Inventory scattered everywhere
inventoryScattered.description: What is on the warehouse, what is on paper, and what is on the computer rarely line up.

unclearAvailability.title: “Do we have it?” with no clear answer
unclearAvailability.description: Small gaps between the warehouse and the desk turn into wrong promises and slow sales.

duplicatePartListings.title: Same part, five different names
duplicatePartListings.description: Duplicate listings and inconsistent codes slow every search and make mistakes at checkout more likely.

unloggedMovement.title: Parts disappear without a trail
unloggedMovement.description: Technicians pull stock, returns pile up, or small adjustments never get logged.

managers.title: Managers & owners
managers.text: See what you have, what moved, and where counts diverge—before they become costly mistakes.

staff.title: Workshop staff
staff.text: Count stock, sell parts, and take payment with fewer steps and less back-and-forth.

extras.0: Preliminary invoices when you need a quote on paper before closing the sale.
extras.1: Reinvoicing when totals or details change—without starting from scratch.

inventories.title: Inventories
inventories.text: Run structured counts and keep history aligned with the floor.

catalog.title: Item catalog
catalog.text: Maintain workshop items with consistent codes and details.

review.title: Review & differences
review.text: Compare expected vs counted stock and resolve discrepancies with confidence.

clients.title: Clients
clients.text: Keep customer records ready for sales and follow-up.

sell.title: Sell & payment
sell.text: Record sales and payments in one flow.

invoices.title: Sales & PDF invoices
invoices.text: Generate professional PDF invoices from completed sales.

download.title: Download Auto Stocker
download.intro: Pick your platform. One click per row downloads the latest release for that platform (served by this site).
download.loadError: Could not load download list. Check that the API is running and release credentials are configured.
download.empty: No release files are available yet.

multiplatform.title: Built for desktop and mobile
multiplatform.description: Run Auto Stocker on desktop for daily operations and keep visibility on your phone when you are away from the workshop.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.intro: Replace placeholders in the marketing build with real app screenshots.

captions.dashboardPhone: Review dashboard metrics from your phone.

alts.dashboardPhone: Auto Stocker dashboard on a phone screen

legal.privacyBody: This placeholder summarizes how we intend to handle data. Replace with your real privacy policy before production. Typically: what you collect, why, retention, subprocessors (e.g. Supabase), user rights, and contact.
